dsl_rule.translation_notes: Converted MA alignment requirement into explicit ordering conditions: uptrend has 20MA > 50MA > 200MA with price above 20MA; downtrend has 20MA < 50MA < 200MA with price below 20MA. Exit conditions use price crossing through the 20MA as the primary exit trigger per the signal description. The signal's complexity regarding support/resistance behavior during partial retracements is captured by monitoring the 20MA as the primary exit level; stronger pullbacks to 50MA or 200MA would require additional exit conditions in practice but are approximated here.

source_rule_text: Enter trades in the direction of strong trends when all three moving averages (20MA, 50MA, 200MA) are lined up in favor of the move, and use these MAs as support/resistance levels for trend continuation or reversal points.
